name: Trail Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the oatmeal, sugar, and dry milk together.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the honey and water, then bring to a boil. Dissolve the Ko-Jel in this mixture.
3. Combine both mixtures. Add water, one teaspoon at a time if needed for handling.
4. Pack the mixture into a square dish.
5. Allow the bars to solidify, then cut into desired blocks.
6. Store in the refrigerator.
